  FreeBSD ports repository

  Log:

  supports the CASv1 and CASv2 protocols.
  
  WWW: http://www.ja-sig.org/wiki/display/CASC/mod_auth_cas
  
  PR:             ports/140348
  Submitted by:   Kimo <kimor79 at yahoo.com>
